features: COMPLETE SKIN HYDRATION SYSTEM - Pack contains 2 x 250ml bottles of premium aqueous cream delivering intense moisturization for dry, sensitive skin with convenient pump dispensers for home and travel use

DERMATOLOGICALLY FORMULATED - Light, non-greasy moisturizing lotion that absorbs quickly, leaving skin soft and supple without clogging pores or causing irritation, suitable for daily face and body use

100% FRAGRANCE-FREE & LANOLIN-FREE - Specially designed for sensitive skin types, our gentle formulation eliminates common irritants while maintaining effective moisturization for eczema-prone and delicate skin
CONVENIENT PUMP DISPENSERS - Easy-to-use pumps deliver precise amount of cream with each press, preventing waste and contamination while making application more hygienic and controlled

VERSATILE SKIN TREATMENT - Ideal for everyday moisturizing, post-shower application, as a makeup remover, after-sun care, and soothes skin irritations making it an essential addition to any skincare routine
description: Product Description ZOPPER | PACK OF 2 Aqueous Cream 250ml: Gentle and Soothing Moisturization – Perfectly formulated to hydrate and protect delicate skin, leaving it soft and smooth without irritation. Lightweight and Non-Greasy Formula – Absorbs quickly for a silky feel, ensuring no residue is left behind for all-day comfort. Fragrance-Free and Lanolin-Free – Ideal for sensitive skin types, offering a safe, allergen-free moisturizing experience. Daily Essential Skincare Solution – Versatile cream suitable for use on the face, hands, and body for full-body hydration. Easy-to-Use Pump Dispenser Convenient packaging ensures precise, mess-free application every time, even in a hurry. Softens and Hydrates Skin Instantly Locks in moisture for long-lasting results, giving your skin the care it deserves. Relief for Dry and Irritated Skin Formulated to calm and soothe discomfort, restoring the skin’s natural moisture barrier. Great Value Twin Pack Two 250ml bottles provide ample supply for prolonged use, ensuring consistent skincare for you and your family.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If this occurs, wash the affected area thoroughly with water. Do not use for serious burns, puncture wounds, or cuts. Discontinue use and seek medical advice if swelling or redness occurs.
